signature_envelope.canonical_form: RFC 8785 JCS over (issued_at + scope + rules_covered[*].rule_id + rules_covered[*].content_hash_sha256)

sunset.condition: Re-attestation by recognized Taiwan sovereign authority OR 36 months from issued_at, whichever earlier

_meta.status: BOOTSTRAP — signature pending maintainer key generation. See sovereign/TW/attestation/SIGNING-GUIDE.md for the key generation and signing procedure. Downstream collectors MUST treat this attestation as unverified (Tier 3 / community-tier trust) until signature_base64 is populated and verified against the published public_key_pem.
